justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "Monday next week, around 3 PM," "earlier slots on Monday, June 8th," and "Wednesday, June 10th, in the afternoon."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but it could have offered more options in the first turn when the initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, making no unnecessary turns or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was mostly fine, with the agent providing clear responses and successfully booking the appointment, though the initial unavailability required a few turns.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by expanding the search to different days and times without losing context, but it did not proactively offer a range of options after the first unavailability.
